---
name: research
description: Use when starting new feature work or investigating a problem before planning
---

# Research — Interrogate, Scope, Define

The starting point for any new work. Before building, interrogate the problem.

## Process

Use the Read tool to read the current codebase context.
Use the Bash tool to run discovery commands.
Use the Grep tool to search for patterns.

## Transition

After completing research outputs, invoke `samsara:planning` skill.
